name: Volcano Hybrid Starter Kit
summary: The Storz & Bickel Hybrid Starter Kit includes food-safe, heat-resistant silicone tubes with no flavour.
description: The Storz & Bickel Hybrid Starter Kit includes food-safe, heat-resistant silicone tubes with no flavour. The EASY VALVE Balloon with Adapter is reusable and can be easily attached to a Balloon Tube. Keep in mind that this kit is specifically designed for use with the Volcano Hybrid. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
